message:
fix: resolve two critical site bugs (data loading + search palette)

1. CSS specificity fix: .search-palette-overlay.hidden now correctly
   hides the search palette. Previously, display:flex from the overlay
   class overrode display:none from Tailwind's .hidden class due to
   equal specificity and source order.

2. Remove z-index:31 from main wrapper div that created unnecessary
   stacking context issues.

3. Updated Cloudflare build command (via API) to copy
   spec_evolution_data_v1.json.gz and levenshtein_bytes.wasm to dist/.
   These are required for page initialization — without them, fetch
   returns 404 and the entire page fails to render.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
